name: mcp-bridge
description: Cocos Creator MCP 桥接插件
author: Firekula

scripts.build: tsc && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2018 --external:ws --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external:vue --outfile=dist/main.js && esbuild src/scene-script.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2018 --outfile=dist/scene-script.js && esbuild src/panel/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2018 --external:electron --outfile=dist/panel/index.js && esbuild src/mcp-proxy.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2018 --outfile=dist/mcp-proxy.js
